source_text: Stay aligned with the belt under all conditions T.5.2.9 Attachment Fasteners - All fasteners attaching scatter shields and guards must be 6 mm or 1/4" minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2 T.5.2.10 Finger Guards a. Must cover any drivetrain parts that spin while the vehicle is stationary with the engine running
